{{Infobox group
| name = Technicians
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] identifies as a specific kind of Technician.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Technicians]] can possess a fabricator gift.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c13">''The Engineer'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] is described as a master Technician.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
